world.name: UET-1 (Unified Eurasian Transit Line 1)
world.tagline: The longest train in the world. The most surveilled corridor in history.
gauge_transitions: European standard gauge (France, Germany, Central Europe)
Vietnamese metre gauge (Southeast Asian terminus approach)

ECOROUTE.full_name: Ecological Route Optimization and Unified Transit Engine
ECOROUTE.origin: Implemented after Car 7 attack / Black Wednesday incident
ECOROUTE.function: Continuous biometric monitoring of all passengers and crew

bio_bands.description: Wristbands assigned to all passengers encoding biometric compliance status

tiers.meaning: Compliant — unrestricted access to all cars and services
Monitoring — minor anomalies flagged, movement logged
Elevated concern — restricted to assigned car, supervisor review pending
High risk — escort required for any movement, under active surveillance
Detention pending — confined to compartment, jurisdictional handoff being arranged
Revocation — identity suspended, biometric profile flagged across all ECOROUTE nodes. Functionally non-person.

Pono.description: Institutional memory device issued to transit officials and senior crew
Pono.function: Persistent archive system with active recall, behavioral pattern matching, and cross-referencing of passenger histories
notable_traits: Has opinions — will editorialize in output if not suppressed
Continues background monitoring even when told to stop
Files reports that may contain 'nothing of note' as a finding
Can instantiate multiple behavioral instances (Clerk, Hacker, Agent modes observed)
Relentless in recall; cannot forget unless explicitly purged
known_users: Detective Pavel Murkin (issued against his will)

concept.definition: Derealized Zones (DRZs) are physical territories that have been functionally re-jurisdicted through software rather than law or land reform. Where Special Economic Zones (SEZs) reshape territory through legal exemptions and physical infrastructure, DRZs reshape territory through perceptual and behavioral infrastructure — the software layer becomes the jurisdiction. Inside a DRZ, what is rendered visible, what identities are legible, and what transactions are possible are determined by the zone's operating protocol, not the host nation's law.
concept.mechanism: A DRZ is established when a territory's built environment is instrumented so completely — sensors, overlay networks, biometric readers, protocol enforcement nodes — that the software stack achieves full environmental coverage. At that threshold, the stack can selectively render or suppress: infrastructure, populations, transactions, even weather data. The physical space has not changed. The experienced space has been terraformed.
concept.relationship_to_ECOROUTE: ECOROUTE does not operate inside DRZs. Each DRZ runs its own biometric stack, which may or may not share data with ECOROUTE at zone boundaries. When UET-1 passes through a DRZ, passengers' bio-bands temporarily rekey to the DRZ's authentication layer. Zone boundary crossing is logged, but the log is encrypted under the zone operator's keys — not accessible to UET-1 operations or any single-nation authority. Exiting triggers a re-sync that overwrites the in-zone record with a compliance summary.
concept.relationship_to_sovereignty: DRZs are not legally sovereign. The host nation retains formal jurisdiction. In practice, the host nation cannot enforce laws the DRZ's software stack does not render enforceable. A body the zone does not register has not arrived. A transaction the zone does not log has not occurred.
concept.key_tension: DRZs were sold as next-generation infrastructure optimization. They function as the largest perception-management operations in human history.

Zoothesia.location: Steppe Corridor, Kazakhstan — approximately 400km west of Astana, spanning ~220km of the Moscow–Astana leg
Zoothesia.established_by: Joint Telluric Empire / Neutral Forge consortium; Neutral Forge holds the protocol license
Zoothesia.operating_protocol: Zoothesia Protocols — a perception-management stack derived from Neutral Forge's infrastructure tooling
Zoothesia.stated_purpose: Steppe corridor optimization: reducing cognitive load on long-haul transit by curating environmental data feeds and suppressing destabilizing sightlines (industrial decay, unauthorized settlements, contested border infrastructure)
Zoothesia.actual_function: Selective erasure of the Kazakhstani steppe's actual population and infrastructure from the perceptual record. Communities outside the zone's registered land-use categories are not rendered. Pipelines and extraction operations not aligned with Telluric Empire supply agreements do not appear on any overlay. The steppe passengers and operators see inside Zoothesia is not the steppe that exists.
Zoothesia.hidden_populations: A significant undocumented population — nomadic herding communities, cross-border gray-market traders, and dissident infrastructure workers — lives in the physical space the Zoothesia Protocols have declared non-existent. Invisible to ECOROUTE. Invisible to the zone's biometric readers. Not in any system that matters.
Zoothesia.connection_to_The_Lights: The Lights installation lies at the western edge of Zoothesia's software envelope. The resonance anchors that produce The Lights also mark the DRZ boundary — where the zone's rendering infrastructure bleeds into uncontrolled steppe. Passengers see them as sublime. They are also a perimeter marker.
Zoothesia.connection_to_Mirage_Handler: The Mirage Handler protocol has a known handshake with Zoothesia's boundary authentication — Cold War disappearance infrastructure interfacing with its commercial successor.
narrative_uses: Characters can step into Zoothesia's unrendered space — the zone's erasure logic works on anyone who exits the registered population layer
Stopping inside Zoothesia triggers a four-way jurisdictional conflict: host nation, Telluric Empire, Neutral Forge, and UET-1 authority all have competing claims, none fully enforceable
The hidden population knows the zone's blind spots better than its operators do

Caduceus.location: Belgrade–Sofia corridor — spans ~180km of the Paris–Istanbul leg, anchored at the former Dimitrovgrad rail junction (Serbia/Bulgaria border zone)
Caduceus.established_by: Sable Meridian consortium fronted through a Liechtenstein-registered infrastructure fund; day-to-day operations licensed to a Neutral Forge subsidiary
Caduceus.operating_protocol: Caduceus Protocols — originally a pharmaceutical logistics and cold-chain verification stack, now a full territorial operating system
Caduceus.stated_purpose: Secure pharmaceutical and biotech logistics corridor, established to handle temperature-sensitive compounds and controlled substances under a single cross-border compliance framework — bypassing the 11 separate national pharmaceutical authorities that otherwise govern this stretch
Caduceus.actual_function: A gray-market logistics processing zone where pharmaceutical compliance is the primary mechanism of territorial control. Inside Caduceus, pharmaceutical identity — what compounds are registered to your biometric profile — carries the same legal weight as civic identity. The Tirzepatide Trail runs through Caduceus; the zone's compliance stack is what makes the trail viable at industrial scale.
Caduceus.physical_character: Visible architecture: a network of climate-controlled waystation structures in the muted blue-grey livery of the operating subsidiary. Looks like logistics infrastructure. Is also a perceptual apparatus.
Caduceus.ECOROUTE_behavior: On exit, bio-bands re-sync with ECOROUTE. The re-sync writes only: 'transit through compliant pharmaceutical corridor.' What the bio-band recorded inside is overwritten. Caduceus does not leak.
Caduceus.connection_to_Sable_Meridian: Marcus Hale uses Caduceus as the primary European handoff point for gray-market compounds. The zone's pharmaceutical compliance stack functions as a laundering layer — substances that enter unregistered exit with a Caduceus Protocol certification most downstream authorities accept without question.
Caduceus.connection_to_The_Covenant: The Covenant was piloted inside Caduceus before Lin Yuan Exact took it global. The zone's 37-node contract architecture is a direct inheritance of that pilot. Several of the 37 Covenant keyholders are Caduceus infrastructure operators.
Caduceus.connection_to_BRX_90: BRX-90 was designed to be administered inside Caduceus, where its biometric integration would be logged under the pharmaceutical compliance stack rather than ECOROUTE — making the injection a compliant medical procedure in the official record.
narrative_uses: Rowan's peptide operation depends on Caduceus transit — the zone is both the trail's corridor and its legitimizing apparatus
A character whose pharmaceutical profile is altered inside Caduceus exits as a different person, biometrically
The Covenant's pilot architecture still runs live inside Caduceus — anyone who understands the original keystructure has leverage over the global system

Car_7.significance: Site of the Black Wednesday attack; now mythologized; ECOROUTE was built in its aftermath
Car_7.symbolic_weight: Passengers dream about it; bio-bands flashing black in nightmares is a recurring image

Strait_Country.description: Neutral territory between Fiduciary States and Telluric Empire spheres of influence
Strait_Country.economic_role: Home to Neutral Forge and Exact Yield Semiconductors; fiscal ledger jurisdiction for The Covenant
Strait_Country.political_status: Notionally independent; practically a managed buffer state

Steppe_Corridor.description: The vast Central Asian segment of the UET-1 route
Steppe_Corridor.notable_events: Location of The Lights installation and the Zoothesia DRZ; Russian broad gauge territory; Murkin's patrol jurisdiction

Cabin_7_14.description: Lin Yuan Exact's cabin aboard UET-1
Cabin_7_14.significance: Found sanitized after his disappearance; no forensic trace remained

Fiduciary_States.description: Global financial and institutional power; maintains intelligence apparatus on and around UET-1
Fiduciary_States.posture: Interventionist, paranoid about Telluric Empire expansion, surveils transit corridors

Telluric_Empire.description: Continental land power; primary beneficiary of UET-1 eastern terminus connectivity
Telluric_Empire.posture: Expansionist through infrastructure and fiscal instruments; opacity as strategy

Neutral_Forge.description: Technology conglomerate headquartered in Strait Country
Neutral_Forge.motto_implied: Build the rails. Own the rails. Become the rails.

Sable_Meridian.description: Arms brokerage and gray-market logistics firm

Corvin_Field_Services.description: Gray-market contractor arm of Sable Meridian
Corvin_Field_Services.operations: Deploys personnel for deniable operations along UET-1 corridor

Marcus_Hale.role: Arms broker and gray-market logistics coordinator
Marcus_Hale.methods: Operates via intermediaries (Alex, Karel); monitors operations through biometric feeds remotely

traits: reads from a manual he wrote himself
Lin_Yuan_Exact.fate: Disappeared from UET-1; resurfaced in Saudi Arabia tending goats
Lin_Yuan_Exact.creation: The Covenant — self-executing time-locked contracts requiring 24 of 37 keys across 19 jurisdictions

Captain_Eriksson.defining_trait: Refuses to stop the train regardless of events aboard — stopping is a jurisdictional event and he treats jurisdiction as sacred
known_refusals: Refused to stop when Lin Yuan Exact disappeared

Stolar_Key_Extraction.description: Operation to extract Stolar's $940M Bitcoin wallet private key
Stolar_Key_Extraction.method: BRX-90 nanoparticle compound injected into Rowan's body; Rowan's biometrics become the cryptographic key
Stolar_Key_Extraction.orchestrator: Marcus Hale via Karel and Alex

BRX_90.function: Encodes cryptographic information into host's biometric signature
BRX_90.effect_on_host: Transforms bearer into living crypto key; ongoing physiological integration

The_Covenant.description: Self-executing time-locked contract system built by Neutral Forge
The_Covenant.mechanics: 37 keyholders across 19 jurisdictions; modification requires 24/37 keys; runs without human oversight
The_Covenant.significance: Effectively autonomous financial infrastructure; no single party can modify it unilaterally

The_Lights.description: 4km of engineered light formations along UET-1 steppe corridor
The_Lights.creator: The Carrier, deployed for Corvin Field Services
The_Lights.technical_mechanism: Resonance anchors creating manufactured atmospheric phenomenon
The_Lights.public_perception: Treated by passengers as natural, mystical, sublime
The_Lights.actual_purpose: Cover for reconnaissance / gray-market contractor operation

Mirage_Handler.description: Cold War-era routing protocol for erasing persons from transit manifests
Mirage_Handler.current_use: Repurposed by refugee networks to erase identities from ECOROUTE manifests
Mirage_Handler.archive_state: Many Mirage files replaced with soup recipes (shchi, pelmeni, stewed carp) by legacy contractors
Mirage_Handler.significance: The infrastructure of disappearance, now serving the disappeared

Tirzepatide_Trail.description: Peptide smuggling route running Lisbon to China along the UET-1 corridor
Tirzepatide_Trail.commodity: Tirzepatide and related GLP-1/somatic optimization compounds

SWIFT_The_Murmur.description: Global financial messaging system; referred to as 'the Murmur' in UET-1 world vernacular
SWIFT_The_Murmur.significance: Foundational financial infrastructure that The Covenant operates alongside

Chain_of_Hands.description: Informal trust network for gray-market transactions along UET-1
Chain_of_Hands.function: Human-mediated authentication and value transfer outside formal financial rails

Three_Oracles.description: Predictive intelligence systems used by Fiduciary States apparatus
Three_Oracles.function: Algorithmic assessment of transit corridor threat levels

Long_Roots.description: Deep-cover intelligence assets embedded in UET-1 operational infrastructure

Shunning.description: Protocol for cutting off an individual from all UET-1 services and identity verification
Shunning.effect: More severe than a black bio-band; the system pretends the person never existed

route_stops.note: All times are approximate rail journey durations between consecutive stops, not total elapsed trip time.

Eurasian_Hinge.note: The Caduceus DRZ occupies ~180km of the Paris–Istanbul leg (Belgrade–Sofia corridor). Bio-bands rekey on entry and exit. ECOROUTE re-sync on exit overwrites in-zone record.

Siberian_Crossing.note: The Zoothesia DRZ occupies ~220km of the Moscow–Astana leg (~400km west of Astana). The Lights installation marks its western boundary. Bio-bands rekey on entry; zone log encrypted under Neutral Forge Covenant keys.

stops.note: Gauge change: Russian broad (1520mm) → Chinese standard (1435mm). Dwell 60–90 min for bogie transition and ECOROUTE decontamination sweep.

narrative_rules: Stopping is a jurisdictional event — the train almost never stops, and when it does, it changes everything.
The train is not neutral. Every car is a political statement.
Surveillance sees everything except what it is programmed to ignore.
Gray markets fill every gap left by formal markets.
The infrastructure of disappearance outlives the people it was built to disappear.
Biometric identity is legal identity. What the system cannot read does not exist.
Distance is not safety — 23,300km is one long room.
Jurisdictions overlap, contradict, and bargain. No single authority governs the whole.
The most powerful thing on the UET-1 is not a weapon — it is a key.
Characters who choose strategic amnesia are making a moral argument, not an evasion.
A DRZ does not change the law. It changes what the law can see.
tone_notes: The world is sophisticated, bureaucratically absurd, and deeply human beneath its systems.
Surveillance is ambient, not dramatic — it hums in the background of every scene.
Moral choices are structural, not individual — the system creates the dilemma.
Humor is dry, technical, and dark — never broad.
The train moves. Events happen in transit. Stasis is impossible.
Names of systems and protocols should feel institutional, slightly opaque — like real bureaucratic language.
The mundane and the geopolitical occupy the same sentence without apology.
